headline: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Confirms Dates for First Quarter 2026 Results and Conference Call, Announces Participation in Upcoming Investor Conference
summary: NORTHBROOK, Ill., April 22, 2026--CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF) today confirmed that it will report its first quarter 2026 results after market close on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The company plans to host a conference call to discuss these results at 11:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, May 7, 2026.

headline: Vale Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: Vale gears up for Q1 results with strong revenue and earnings growth forecasts, supported by higher iron ore, copper and nickel output, and pricing gains.

headline: DOW Warms Up to Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing for the Stock?
summary: DOW heads into Q1 earnings with demand softness clouding the outlook, but cost cuts and productivity moves may help cushion results.
